goal: Productize the existing Phase 1 frontend interaction layer without product-scope expansion, new top-level menus, production deployment, or production cutover.
summary: DEV-023 productized existing frontend interaction flows in the frozen Phase 1 modules. Dashboard/workbench rows and notifications now jump to related objects; project, task, chat, knowledge, contract, approval and settings views expose relationship navigation and selection-first context; LAN local delivery scripts and README instructions were added. The writer executor produced a diff but did not return a terminal report, so the verifier reran all local gates. npm ci, lint, typecheck, test, build, smoke:api and audit passed. Web/API LAN services were started and local HTTP checks passed.

json_parse.command: JSON parse for current_status and DEV-023 run files

jsonl_parse.command: JSONL parse for runtime memory logs

browser_verification.command: browser verification against the web app
browser_verification.result: Web opened at http://127.0.0.1:3011 and LAN service advertised http://192.168.2.90:3011; API health passed at http://127.0.0.1:3002. Browser plugin text input failed because virtual clipboard is unavailable; login/object flows are covered by API smoke.

next_action: Open PR for DEV-023, pass GitHub required checks and review gate, then keep LAN test server available for user acceptance; do not cut over production until signed release window.
